title: Liberty Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Liberty Shoes is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
